description: Trace schema version is fixed before collection
Privacy redaction excludes raw prompt/content/user identifiers before collection
No raw content or disallowed privacy columns are collected
Evidence-pack manifest generation is planned
Trace file hashing is planned for package replay
Provenance attestation can be produced by the acquisition system
Privacy attestation can be produced by the acquisition system
Known reopen-threshold scenario mapping is selected before launch
Hybrid path is instrumented on the same workload
Programmable accelerator counterfactual is instrumented on the same workload
Hybrid and accelerator energy are measured rather than proxied
Hybrid and baseline latency are measured per request
Utilization is measured for the same policy window
Fallback audit and update accounting are captured
Health and drift gates are captured for accepted fast-path credit
Policy version window consistency is enforced
Collection source is production shadow production or canary production
Design is not synthetic scaled replay posing as evidence
Design is not vendor benchmark or local proxy only
Design is not single-path fast-path-only logging
